title: Craftable Chainmail
description: Makes chainmail craftable with iron nuggets
body:
# Craftable Chainmail

Makes chainmail craftable with iron nuggets. This makes for decent armor in the early game to bridge the gap between leather and iron.

![](https://i.imgur.com/ySEvx1F.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/e088MLI.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6hgJy80.png)
